answers: Good nutrition means eating a balanced diet with the right amounts of carbohydrates, proteins, fats, vitamins, and minerals to keep your body healthy and energized.
Balanced diet mane sob food group theke khaoa — protein, carbs, healthy fats, vitamins, ar minerals. Fruits, vegetables, whole grains, ar lean protein include koro.
Macronutrients are carbs, proteins, and fats — you need them in large amounts. Micronutrients are vitamins and minerals — needed in small amounts but equally important for health.
Eat more whole foods, reduce processed food, drink plenty of water, and include colorful fruits and vegetables in every meal. Consistency matters more than perfection in nutrition.
